meta.name: Aggregate tech trend signals from RSS feeds into Google Sheets and Slack

name: Aggregate trend signals to Google Sheets and Slack

parameters.content:
## Aggregate trend signals to Google Sheets and Slack

This workflow scans multiple RSS feeds daily, scores each item against configurable keyword groups, clusters them into themes, and delivers a prioritized intelligence report.

## How it works
1. **Daily trigger** fetches RSS feeds from Hacker News (50+ points) and Product Hunt in parallel
2. **Merge node** waits for all feeds to complete before proceeding
3. **RSS parser** extracts and normalizes titles, descriptions, URLs, and dates from all feeds
4. **Keyword scorer** matches each item against 7 configurable keyword groups (AI, No-Code, SaaS, Dev Tools, Marketing, Pricing, Productivity) with weighted scoring
5. **Theme aggregator** clusters scored items into themes, calculates theme strength using source diversity and volume bonuses, and classifies as VERY_STRONG / STRONG / MODERATE / WEAK
6. **Report builder** generates a complete intelligence report (plain text for Slack, HTML for email)
7. **Outputs** — sends report to Slack + email, logs individual signals and themes to separate Google Sheet tabs

## Setup steps
1. Connect **Google Sheets OAuth2** credentials and update the Sheet ID in both "Log Signals to Sheet" and "Log Themes to Sheet" nodes
2. Create a Google Sheet with two tabs:
   - `signal` — headers: `date`, `title`, `source`, `score`, `category`, `url`
   - `themes` — headers: `date`, `category`, `signal_level`, `theme_strength`, `item_count`, `sources`, `top_keywords`
3. Connect **Slack OAuth2** credentials and configure the target channel
4. Connect **Gmail OAuth2** credentials and update the recipient email address
5. Activate the workflow

## Customization
- **Add more RSS feeds** — duplicate a feed node, connect it to the Merge node, and add parsing logic in the "Parse All RSS Feeds" node
- **Edit keyword groups** — modify the `keywordGroups` object in the "Score and Classify Signals" node to match your industry
- **Adjust source weights** — change the weight multipliers (Hacker News: 1.5x, Product Hunt: 1.3x) in the parser
- **Theme thresholds** — modify the strength cutoffs (30/15/8) in the aggregator node
- **Schedule** — change from daily to hourly or weekly in the trigger node

## 1. Fetch RSS Feeds
Trigger fires daily. Hacker News and Product Hunt feeds are fetched in parallel. Merge node waits for both to complete before passing data forward.

## 2. Parse and Score
RSS XML is parsed into normalized items. Each item is scored against 7 keyword groups with configurable weights. Title matches get a bonus multiplier.

## 3. Aggregate Themes and Build Report
Signals are clustered into themes with strength scores (using source diversity and volume bonuses). A full intelligence report is generated in both plain text and HTML.

## 4. Deliver and Log
Report is posted to Slack and emailed. Individual signals and theme summaries are logged to separate Google Sheet tabs for historical analysis.
⚠️ **Update the email address** in this node to your own recipient before activating.

## Keyword Group Reference
Edit these in the "Score and Classify Signals" node:

| Group | Weight |
|---|---|
| AI & Automation | 2.0 |
| No-Code / Low-Code | 1.8 |
| Pricing & Monetization | 1.6 |
| SaaS & Business | 1.5 |
| Marketing & Growth | 1.4 |
| Developer Tools | 1.3 |
| Remote & Productivity | 1.1 |

**Source Weights:**
- Hacker News: 1.5x
- Product Hunt: 1.3x
